# Marcus Felling

> A technical blog by Marcus Felling covering DevOps, CI/CD, cloud engineering, and automation. Practical guides and notes from real-world experience building and shipping software with Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Playwright, Terraform, Bicep, and more.

## About

Marcus Felling is a builder at Microsoft who writes about the tools and techniques he uses in his day-to-day work. Topics include continuous integration and delivery pipelines, infrastructure as code, test automation, Azure cloud services, and developer tooling.

- Site: {{ site.url }}
- RSS Feed: {{ site.url }}/feed.xml
- Archives: {{ site.url }}/archives
